title: jatropha cathartica
intro: Jatropha cathartica, also known as the Purging Nut, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's roots, seeds, and leaves are used in traditional medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and purgative effects. The health benefits of Jatropha cathartica include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. Herbal preparations of Jatropha cathartica are typically made by infusing the roots or seeds in hot water to create a decoction or by mixing the powdered seeds with water to create a paste.
